name: Supply Chain Streaming Pipeline
description: Pub/Sub -> validate -> window -> dedup -> enrich -> BigQuery Bronze, for the real-time supply chain platform.

parameters.name: project
parameters.label: GCP Project ID
parameters.helpText: Project containing the Pub/Sub topics and BigQuery datasets.

parameters.name: environment
parameters.label: Environment
parameters.helpText: dev, uat, or prod — selects which subscriptions/tables/secret this job reads and writes.

parameters.name: raw_archive_bucket
parameters.label: Raw archive GCS bucket
parameters.helpText: Output of the storage module, e.g. PROJECT-raw-event-archive-dev.

parameters.name: carrier_secret_id
parameters.label: Carrier API Secret Manager secret ID

parameters.name: pipeline_version
parameters.label: Pipeline version
parameters.helpText: Git SHA or build tag, written to every row's _pipeline_version audit column.
